productName: Seattle Bubble Works Hash Blunt - Super Boof (H) - 3g
description: A hybrid blunt of Super Boof taken up a level with concentrate — flower plus potent extract rolled together for a bold, slow-burning, full-flavored smoke. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe. Pace yourself.
